story_arceus_10_08000/2401_1001_0100_10:
I was able to challenge myself and try
something new—all thanks to Diantha.
story_arceus_10_08000/2401_1001_0200_10:
This will be my first time acting in front of
an audience, but I hope you enjoy it!
story_arceus_10_08000/2401_1001_0300_10:
This is a special day for Geeta. It’s her
acting debut!
story_arceus_10_08000/2401_1001_0400_10:
Let her brilliance shine and be remembered
by everyone!
